log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Goblin — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Goblin — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Goblin — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Goblin — Winged Striker.
→ Goblin — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 15 necrotic damage (half).
--- Goblin — Winged Striker --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!

→ Goblin — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
